heading: Repealed. ,Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(114)65 Stat. 706
label: 1071 to 1073 Repealed. ,Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(114)65 Stat. 706
notes: Section 1071, , , provided for designation by President of abandoned military reservations for disposition by Secretary of the Interior.act July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 123 Stat. 103
Section 1072, , , related to survey or subdivision of those lands and appraisal, advertisement and sale and rights of settlers.act July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 223 Stat. 103
Section 1073, , , related to sale of improvements or other property on those reservations.act July 5, 1884, ch. 214, § 323 Stat. 103
